mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_page_visit_log (id, page_type, page_key, ip, visited_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{pageType}, #{pageKey}, #{ip}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ip) FROM t_page_visit_log WHERE visited_at >= #{startDay}

SELECT country, COUNT(DISTINCT ip) AS cnt -- 独立 IP 数量 FROM t_page_visit_log WHERE visited_at >= #{startDay} AND country IS NOT NULL -- 排除未解析的记录 AND country != '' -- 排除空字符串 AND country != 'Local' -- 排除本地开发环境 GROUP BY country ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT * FROM t_page_visit_log WHERE country IS NULL -- 未解析地理位置的记录 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
